---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Enter '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Money / balance details (if relevant)

If this involves an incorrect amount, balance, or net worth, please include the exact figures (in MYR) and the account/transaction types involved. Sens stores money as integer cents, so precise numbers help a lot.

## Environment

- **OS:** [e.g. macOS 15.5 / Windows 11 / Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Sens version:** [e.g. 1.2.1 — see the app's Settings or About]
- **Install method:** [packaged release / built from source]

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — logs, recent actions, etc.
